dataset_license.scope: RackTables-derived definition content in data/device-identities/project-definitions.json, data/device-identities/runtime-index.json, and API responses

racktables-static-label-normalization-v1.sys_object_id: Exact enterprises-relative static numeric key expanded under 1.3.6.1.4.1; enterprise roots are rejected.
racktables-static-label-normalization-v1.model: mibvendor-authored bounded normalization of the RackTables leading label, retained only when a colon or comma creates an unambiguous boundary; port and switch summary suffixes are stripped.
racktables-static-label-normalization-v1.enterprise_number: First enterprises-relative arc cross-checked against the pinned IANA PEN snapshot.
racktables-static-label-normalization-v1.firmware_scope: Always not_established; the source contains no firmware-range evidence.
